people.name: Maya
people.conversation_summary: Your bond is not flimsy, but it is not easy: it leans on emotional and karmic depth first, with both of you carrying Leo rising and a strong Sun-Mars current that gives the relationship pride, loyalty, and the sense that you are meant to build something real. The strongest thread is feeling and fate

people.name: Arjun
people.conversation_summary: Arjun carries an Aries rising—first-fire, direct, built to begin—and yet the soul keeps turning inward, as if a warrior were also a mystic.
